education.details: Thesis: 'Mechanistic Insights into Protein-Cosolute Interactions: From Denaturants to Stabilizers in Biopharmaceutical Formulations'. Dissertation submitted (11/2025); currently under review, defense expected in Q1 2026.
Thesis: 'Bioinformatics approaches for characterization of quality attributes of biopharmaceuticals using statistical and machine learning based methods' (Note 1.0)

experience.company: Boehringer Ingelheim Pharma GmbH Co. KG
experience.description: Industrial Ph.D. research in Analytics Development Biologicals, Early Stage Analytics Laboratory.
achievements: Developed ML models for spectral deconvolution and pattern recognition in antibodies and excipients characterizations.
Developed Automated liquid handling and data analysis process with python for protein characterization studies.
Data management and lightweight data engineering for daily experimental outputs, supporting structured storage, automation, and reproducible analysis.
Studies of antibody interactions with and cosolutes using classical MD simulations and analytical chemistry methods.
Designed protocols for antibody stability studies, including forced degradation and enzymatic digestion.

experience.company: Boehringer Ingelheim Pharma GmbH Co. KG
experience.description: Thesis: 'Bioinformatics approaches for characterization of quality attributes of biopharmaceuticals using statistical and machine learning based methods'
achievements: Developed ML model for pattern recognition of surfactant degradation profiles in drug formulations, enabling classification and clustering of degraded lipid chains from UPLC-CAD data.
Developed neural network model to predict solvation energy of electrolytes based on their atomistic properties achieved by conceptual Density Functional Theory principles.

experience.description: Data validation and Testing Quality Control of molecular diagnostic solutions.

Utilized chemical product metadata, safety documentation (SDS, CoA), and regulatory data (K-REACH, REACH, TSCA) to support compliant import/export of specialty chemicals across Europe, the USA, Japan, and India. Analyzed logistics and pricing data to coordinate international shipments, negotiate freight costs, and adapt pricing strategies to changing market conditions.
